title: Piping Material Specification (PMS)
description: Canonical, company-agnostic schema for a Piping Material Specification. Designed for NIOEC and adaptable to other owners/EPCs via an import adapter that maps each source into these fields.

company.description: Owner/EPC that issued the PMS, e.g. NIOEC.

class.description: Pipe class / line class code, e.g. A1A1.

main_material.description: Base material family, e.g. CS, 1-1/4CR-0.5MO, SS316.

flange_rating_face.description: Flange rating and facing, e.g. 'CL.150 RF'.

temp_C.description: Pressure-temperature rating table: temperature points (deg C).

press_barg.description: Allowable pressure (barg) matching each temp_C point, in order.

components.description: Material selection rows. Each row = a component type over a size range with a governing description (material + standard + schedule/rating/facing).

part.description: Component/part name, e.g. PIPE, 90 ELBOW, GATE VALVE, GASKET.

size_from.description: Lower NPS bound of the size range (inch).

size_to.description: Upper NPS bound of the size range (inch).

size_raw.description: Raw size cell tokens as they appear in source (preserves merged/double-column layouts).

description.description: Verbatim material/standard description, e.g. 'ASTM A234 GR.WPB SMLS LONG RADIUS BW PER ASME B16.9 SCH40'.

branch_table.description: Optional branch-connection matrix (header/run size vs branch size -> connection type). Not populated in v1.
